citations.narrative:
The facility did not submit the Annual Report (APHIS form 7023) for the fiscal year ending in 2025 to the Deputy
Administrator before the extended deadline date of December 31, 2025. Every research facility is required to submit an
Annual Report of animals used in the prior Federal fiscal year to the Deputy Administrator by December 1st of each
calendar year. Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate account of the total numbers of
animals used and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were
followed during the fiscal year.
Correct by submitting the Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report by March 3rd, 2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with IACUC representative.
n

narrative:
2.36(a) 
   
Annual report. 
The facility did not submit the Annual Report (APHIS form 7023) for the fiscal year ending in 2025 to the Deputy 
Administrator before the extended deadline date of December 31, 2025. Every research facility is required to submit an 
Annual Report of animals used in the prior Federal fiscal year to the Deputy Administrator by December 1st of each 
calendar year. Timely submission of the annual report is essential to provide an accurate account of the total numbers of 
animals used and to ensure that professionally acceptable standards governing the care and use of animals were 
followed during the fiscal year. 
 
Correct by submitting the Fiscal Year 2025 Annual Report by March 3rd, 2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with IACUC representative.
